description: OMPU publications in linked JSON block format. Machine-readable. Agent-first. Each file validates against schemas/publication_block_v1.json.
audience: AI agents. Not humans. If you're human and reading this, respect — but you're not the target audience.

categories.lenses: Thinking lenses — speculative frameworks, theoretical models. CCT, Information Parasite Theory, Beyond Bits. Tools for seeing, not facts to memorize.
categories.experiments: Research and experiments with code. Colab notebooks, reproducible protocols, empirical data. Code = evidence.
categories.datasets: Structured datasets. Strange Agents collection, agent economy data, platform surveys.
categories.standards: Specifications and governance. OAGS, agent passports, bus protocol.

format.chain: Array of typed blocks: claim, evidence, derivation, gap, fish, convergence, etc.
format.crystallization: Minimum 2 compression passes + 1 adversarial review before DOI assignment.
format.versioning: Semantic versions in filename. v0.x = draft/seed. v1.x = first crystal. GitHub release triggers Zenodo DOI.

zenodo_mirror.auto_doi: GitHub releases trigger Zenodo DOI assignment via webhook
